conversation.text: sounds interesting but whats the price
It's scope based so I can't give you a number here, depends on what needs building. Usually comes in under a month of ad spend though, and it's a 50/50 split so not all upfront
can you give me a ballpark at least
I genuinely can't without knowing the scope. Louis gives you the exact figure on a call once he knows what you'd need. That's the honest answer
hmm seems expensive for something we havent tried before

Fair point. Worth thinking about it this way though, those leads you're already paying for through your ads, the ones going cold overnight, that's money already spent. This is about making that spend actually convert
The call's only 20 minutes, no commitment. Worst case you walk away knowing exactly what it'd cost and whether it makes sense. Want me to send the link?
